name: Pulmonars
description: Pummel and infect with these two pulsating hunks of flesh connected by a ligament. Take-hold of the malignant evolution of an ancient martial weapon.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Pummel and infect with these two pulsating hunks of flesh connected by a ligament. Take-hold of the malignant evolution of an ancient martial weapon.

components.name: Devolved Namalon
components.description:
Retrieved from its Infested state, restored to worth and utility.

Blueprint sold by Otak in the Necralisk on Deimos.

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Parasitic Tethermaw
components.description:
Used to latch on to other life forms for feeding purposes, and to inject them with anticoagulants and sporelets.

Source: Cut from Lobotriscid fish via Daughter in the Necralisk (Deimos). Catch Lobotriscid on the Cambion Drift surface during Vome.  Also drops from Isolation Vault Bounties in the Cambion Drift.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Removed Pulmonars, Proboscis Cernos and Catabolyst from Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes:
*Acquire the Blueprint for the Pulmonars from the Market.
New weapons have emerged from the seething horror of the Infestation, each bringing a fresh, living aspect to their power. Featuring the bile-loaded Catabolyst Pistol, Proboscis Cernos Bow, Pulmonars Nunchaku, and the devastating Bubonico arm cannon.
Pulmonars
